text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Fine Motion taking a leisurely
stroll by the fields and admiring the flora.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The grass and trees here really are
different to Ireland's.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, a ladybug. Hehe, you're the same wherever
you are.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'd appreciate it if you didn't touch them.
They're quite delicate.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I do apologize. Did I scare you, little
ladybug?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I must say, I'm quite amazed by you, Flash! You
know them so well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well, I am in the lower rungs of the Ladybug Conservation Society.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They're pleasant to the eye and keep plant life
safe from those pesky aphids. It's only fair to pay
them at least a little respect.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. So in other words, these bugs are the
knights protecting the field!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If they're the knights, I guess that makes you their
commander?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Me? A commander?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you are Eishin Flash, Knight Commander of
the Ladybug Army! When the Aphid Brigade was
plotting yet another attack on the field...

text_block_list.name: Aphid Brigade
text_block_list.text: Creep, creep...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, in formation! We will put a stop to
these foes once and for all!

text_block_list.name: Ladybug Knights
text_block_list.text: Scuttle, scuttle!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Just like that! What do you think? Does it not
sound wonderful?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well... I don't think I would be in charge of
fending off a large-scale aphid attack, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would consider it a great honor if my
conservation efforts earned me such a title.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right? From this day forth, you are to be known
as Knight Commander!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I will now announce your first official
task as commander. Have you steeled yourself for
the challenge?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Would you introduce me to all the noble knights
guarding the academy's field? I have only met
one so far.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's a simple request. I'll gladly introduce them
to you.
